Ten test case: Mo danh sach chuong trinh khuyen mai
Buoc kiem thu: Vao Khuyen mai > Danh sach chuong trinh
Ket qua ky vong: Hien thi man Quan ly chuong trinh khuyen mai

Ten test case: Kiem tra bo loc danh sach CTKM
Buoc kiem thu: Quan sat bo loc trang thai, nhom khach hang, pham vi
Ket qua ky vong: Bo loc hien thi

Ten test case: Mo man Them moi CTKM
Buoc kiem thu: Click Them moi chuong trinh
Ket qua ky vong: Mo man Them moi chuong trinh khuyen mai

Ten test case: Validate khi luu CTKM rong
Buoc kiem thu: Click Luu khi chua nhap
Ket qua ky vong: Hien thi validation

Ten test case: Kiem tra tab Thong tin chung
Buoc kiem thu: Quan sat tab Thong tin chung
Ket qua ky vong: Co ten, dieu kien, doi tuong, mo ta, thoi gian, phan loai

Ten test case: Kiem tra thoi gian ap dung

Ten test case: Kiem tra Theo san pham - Giam gia ban
Buoc kiem thu: Chon Theo san pham/Giam gia ban

Ten test case: Kiem tra Theo san pham - Tang kem
Buoc kiem thu: Chon Tang kem san pham khac
Ket qua ky vong: Co cau hinh tang kem

Ten test case: Kiem tra Theo san pham - Mua gia thap
Buoc kiem thu: Chon Duoc mua san pham khac gia thap
Ket qua ky vong: Co cau hinh san pham mua kem

Ten test case: Kiem tra Theo don hang
Buoc kiem thu: Chon Theo don hang
Ket qua ky vong: Co cau hinh giam gia hoa don va qua tang

Ten test case: Kiem tra tab Pham vi ap dung
Buoc kiem thu: Mo tab Pham vi ap dung
Ket qua ky vong: Co tinh/xa/diem ban va danh sach ap dung

Ten test case: Mo cap nhat CTKM
Buoc kiem thu: Click action sua dong dau
Ket qua ky vong: Mo man cap nhat CTKM

Ten test case: Kiem tra action dung/tiep tuc/bat dau
Buoc kiem thu: Mo popup action neu co roi huy
Ket qua ky vong: Popup xac nhan hien thi, khong doi trang thai

Ten test case: Mo danh sach dieu kien
Buoc kiem thu: Vao Danh sach dieu kien
Ket qua ky vong: Hien thi danh sach dieu kien

Ten test case: Mo form them dieu kien
Tien dieu kien: Dang o danh sach dieu kien
Buoc kiem thu: Click Them dieu kien
Ket qua ky vong: Mo popup Them moi dieu kien don hang

Ten test case: Validate them dieu kien rong
Tien dieu kien: Dang o form them dieu kien
Buoc kiem thu: Click Xac nhan khi chua nhap
Ket qua ky vong: Hien thi validation

Ten test case: Kiem tra cac loai dieu kien
Tien dieu kien: Dang o form them dieu kien
Buoc kiem thu: Quan sat cau hinh dieu kien
Ket qua ky vong: Co dieu kien tong don, san pham rang buoc

Ten test case: Mo form sua dieu kien
Buoc kiem thu: Click icon sua dong dau
Ket qua ky vong: Mo popup cap nhat dieu kien

Ten test case: Mo danh sach doi tuong
Buoc kiem thu: Vao Danh sach doi tuong
Ket qua ky vong: Hien thi danh sach nhom doi tuong

Ten test case: Mo form them nhom doi tuong
Tien dieu kien: Dang o danh sach doi tuong
Buoc kiem thu: Click Them nhom doi tuong
Ket qua ky vong: Mo drawer Them nhom doi tuong

Ten test case: Validate them nhom doi tuong rong
Buoc kiem thu: Click Xac nhan khi chua nhap
Ket qua ky vong: Hien thi validation

Ten test case: Kiem tra cac loai nhom doi tuong
Buoc kiem thu: Quan sat cac lua chon
Ket qua ky vong: Co nhom khach hang, khach tuy chinh, khach moi

Ten test case: Mo form sua nhom doi tuong
Buoc kiem thu: Click icon sua dong dau
Ket qua ky vong: Mo drawer cap nhat nhom doi tuong

Ten test case: Them dieu kien khuyen mai hop le
Buoc kiem thu: Click Them dieu kien, nhap ten auto, nhap gia tri toi thieu, chon Khong yeu cau, Xac nhan va tim lai
Ket qua ky vong: Dieu kien duoc them thanh cong va hien thi trong danh sach

Ten test case: Sua dieu kien khuyen mai vua tao
Buoc kiem thu: Tim dieu kien auto, click sua, doi ten, Xac nhan va tim lai theo ten moi
Ket qua ky vong: Dieu kien duoc cap nhat thanh cong

Ten test case: Xoa dieu kien khuyen mai vua tao
Tien dieu kien: Da co dieu kien auto da sua
Buoc kiem thu: Tim dieu kien auto, click xoa, dong y xoa va tim lai
Ket qua ky vong: Dieu kien khong con trong danh sach

Ten test case: Them nhom doi tuong ap dung hop le
Buoc kiem thu: Click Them nhom doi tuong, nhap ten auto, nhap ghi chu, Xac nhan va tim lai
Ket qua ky vong: Nhom doi tuong duoc them thanh cong va hien thi trong danh sach

Ten test case: Sua nhom doi tuong ap dung vua tao
Tien dieu kien: Da co nhom doi tuong auto
Buoc kiem thu: Tim nhom doi tuong auto, click sua, doi ten, Xac nhan va tim lai theo ten moi
Ket qua ky vong: Nhom doi tuong duoc cap nhat thanh cong

Ten test case: Xoa nhom doi tuong ap dung vua tao
Tien dieu kien: Da co nhom doi tuong auto da sua
Buoc kiem thu: Tim nhom doi tuong auto, click xoa, dong y xoa va tim lai
Ket qua ky vong: Nhom doi tuong khong con trong danh sach

Ten test case: Them chuong trinh khuyen mai dang luu nhap
Tien dieu kien: Co san dieu kien va nhom doi tuong
Buoc kiem thu: Nhap ten, chon dieu kien/doi tuong, cau hinh theo don hang, chon pham vi, click Luu nhap
Ket qua ky vong: CTKM luu nhap duoc tao va hien thi trong danh sach

Ten test case: Sua chuong trinh khuyen mai dang luu nhap
Tien dieu kien: Da co CTKM luu nhap auto
Buoc kiem thu: Tim CTKM auto, click sua, doi ten, click Luu va tim lai
Ket qua ky vong: CTKM duoc cap nhat thanh cong

Ten test case: Kiem tra CTKM khong co action xoa tren UI hien tai
Tien dieu kien: Da co CTKM auto da sua
Buoc kiem thu: Quan sat cot thao tac cua dong CTKM auto
Ket qua ky vong: UI hien tai khong co nut xoa CTKM
